name: parse_service_request
description: Parse natural language input in Urdu, Roman Urdu, or English to extract structured service details.

name: find_providers
description: Performs 6-factor match on eligible providers and returns top 5 mathematically scored providers.

name: reason_and_shortlist
description: LLM picks the best 2 providers from the top 5 and generates customer-visible reasoning.

name: create_booking
description: Creates a booking in the database and immediately starts the 3-minute provider response timer.

name: handle_provider_timeout
description: Timer expired — automatically reruns the provider matching pipeline excluding the timed-out providers.

name: handle_cancellation
description: Provider cancelled — automatically reruns the pipeline to find a replacement.

name: get_smart_suggestions
description: Returns personalized service suggestions based on the user's booking history and seasonal trends.

name: submit_review
description: Submits a post-job customer review and instantly recalculates the provider's overall rating.

name: generate_receipt
description: Generates a PDF service receipt using ReportLab, uploads to Firebase, and returns the public download URL.
